summary:
Liver biopsies indicating “giant cell/neonatal hepatitis” suggest serious hepatic inflammation; among possible causes, type 1 glycogen storage disease fits well due to its impact on newborns' liver health. \boxed{D}

The summary focuses only on the critical aspects related to diagnosing the cause from typical neonatal issues linked closely with hepatocellular pathology as indicated by the specific histological findings mentioned. It also aligns directly with Agent2’s conclusion while ensuring brevity within two sentences. 

Note that D refers back to an option not explicitly listed here but implied through context or previous discussion about potential answers.
